Title: Authorizes the discontinuance of certain parkland in the town of Windham, located in the county of Greene
Summary: Authorizes the discontinuance of certain parkland in the town of Windham, located in the county of Greene, for the purposes of decommissioning an old baseball facility and pedestrian safety.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the discontinuance of certain parkland in the town of Windham, located in the county of Greene
